channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Dua Lipa Makes Surprise Appearance at Tame Impala’s London O2 Show
item.description: 🎉 When Dua Lipa joined Tame Impala on stage at the O2 in London, magic happened! ✨ #MusicCollabs #SurpriseGuests

item.title: Joey Valence & Brae Turn ‘Security’ Into Dance-Rap Chaos on ‘Like A Version’
item.description: 🎶 Joey Valence and Brae bring the heat with their dance-rap collaboration 'Security' on 'Like A Version!' 🔥💃 #MusicMonday

item.title: Katy Perry, Future, Lisa, Tyla, and More to Headline U.S. World Cup Opening Ceremony
item.description: 🎉 Exciting lineup alert! Katy Perry, Future, Lisa, Tyla, and more set to rock the U.S. World Cup Opening Ceremony! 🌟🎶 #MusicNews #WorldCupVibes

item.title: Cher’s Son Elijah Blue Allman Claims His Mother No Longer Sends Him a ‘Recurring Gift Income’
item.description: 🎶 Cher's son Elijah Blue Allman reveals surprise gift income update! 💰 #FamilyDrama #MusicNews

item.title: Muna Announce 2026 Tour
item.description: 🎉 Let's dance into the future with @whereisMUNA's electrifying 2026 tour announcement! Who's ready to sing along? 🎶 #MUNA2026Tour
